industries.label: Wind Energy
industries.description: India is world's 4th largest wind market with 48+ GW installed capacity. Target of 140 GW by 2030 (onshore + offshore). Value chain spans raw materials, blade/tower/nacelle manufacturing, turbine OEM, wind farm EPC & IPP, grid evacuation, and O&M.; Offshore wind is an emerging frontier with 1 GW blocks auctioned in Gujarat. India exports wind components globally.
